tasks.deno-run-test: deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env hql.ts ./test/hello.hql && deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env hql.ts ./test/add.hql && deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env ./test/hello.js && deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env ./test/add.js
tasks.hql-run-test: hql run ./test/hello.hql && hql run ./test/add.hql && hql run ./test/hello.js && hql run ./test/add.js
tasks.test: deno task clean && deno task unit-test && deno task deno-run-test && deno task hql-run-test
